title: arenaria montana subsp. montana
intro: Arenaria montana subsp. montana, commonly known as Mountain Sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, Primulaceae, that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mountain Sandwort include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of Mountain Sandwort include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
